meta.title: Ferrimonas senticii sp. nov., a novel gammaproteobacterium isolated from the mucus of a puffer fish caught in Kaneohe Bay, Hawai'i
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: In Fig. 1a on page 2671 of this paper, the neighbour-joining phylogenetic tree based on 16S rRNA gene sequences, the name of the novel species is given incorrectly as Ferrimonas sinisina P2S11T. The correct name for the novel species should be Ferrimonas senticii P2S11T. A corrected version of the figure is shown below.
